hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: Over a decade in education. A school built on the belief that every child deserves to be known.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Better One's Life
mission.text: Edusky Private School is more than just a school; it is a community. We believe in fostering strong relationships between students, teachers and parents. Our dedicated faculty is committed to providing a nurturing environment where every child feels valued and inspired. We offer quality educational services to learners of all age groups and backgrounds, empowering them with the knowledge and personal skills necessary to shape their future.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: Empowering Tomorrow's Leaders
vision.text: We strive to accomplish academic excellence and a higher standard of living for every student. Our goal is delivering a holistic education that combines strong academics with deep character development, preparing students for success in personal and professional life.

founder.name: Dr. Ng Peng Long
founder.bio: Dr. Ng Peng Long holds a PhD in Marketing from Universiti Sains Malaysia and brings more than two decades of senior leadership in education and training. He spent seventeen years as a Director at Wawasan Open University, served as Deputy CEO of Austin Legacy Education (Asia Metropolitan University), and is currently CEO of Lead Future Holdings Sdn Bhd, where he leads work in talent development, training, certification, and ESG. Under his leadership, Edusky was built on a simple belief: that small classes, strong relationships, and a parent's ability to walk in unannounced and be greeted by name are not luxuries — they are the foundation of how children learn best. His vision for the school is rooted in collaboration, inclusivity, and academic excellence that prepares students to thrive in life, not just in exams.

values.title: Known by Name
values.description: No child falls through the cracks. Our teachers know each student's strengths, challenges, interests, and learning style — personally, not from a file.

values.title: Nurtured to Grow
values.description: Every child feels valued and inspired. Warmth with boundaries. Clear expectations with consistent follow-through. Relationships strong enough to hold accountability and gentle enough to build trust.

values.title: Empowered for Life
values.description: We teach children how to think, not what to think. Confidence, creativity, and the ability to ask better questions. Academic excellence paired with character development prepares students to shape their future.

values.title: Rooted in Community
values.description: Strong relationships between students, teachers, and parents. CSR projects, parent workshops, expert talks, and student volunteering — a community built together, not an institution run from above.

timeline.title: Foundation
timeline.description: Edusky Learning Academy founded. A single classroom with a conviction: every child deserves to be known.

timeline.title: Expansion
timeline.description: Expanded to multi-standard primary. First cohort of Standard 1–6 students.

timeline.title: Upgrade
timeline.description: Facilities upgraded. Chinese investor delegation visits and positively assesses campus.

timeline.title: Registration
timeline.description: Rebranded as Edusky Private School. SMIPS registration JDA1001. MOE-registered KSSR curriculum.

timeline.title: Community
timeline.description: Micro-school model formalised. Community programmes, parent network, and alumni outreach begin.
